title: solanum nigrum var. nodiflorum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. nodiflorum, also known as the black nightshade or small-leaved nightshade, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. nodiflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
